---
title: "Dr Jade Maggs"
subtitle: "Fisheries Data Scientist"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.role-categories}
Fisheries Science & Monitoring | Data Systems & Information Management | Analytics & Decision Support | Automation & Digital Solutions
:::

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="70%"}

## Welcome

I am a fisheries scientist and data professional with 18 years of experience across South Africa, New Zealand, and Australia. I specialise in recreational fisheries survey design and harvest estimation, including the design and delivery of national-scale boat ramp creel survey programmes, fisheries database development, spatial analysis and mapping, and data analysis and modelling. I work primarily in R, SQL, and QGIS.

I am based in Brisbane, registered under an Australian ABN, and available for short-term remote consulting engagements. My particular interest is in Pacific fisheries data and monitoring support projects.

### What I do

- **Fisheries Science & Monitoring**: Design, implementation and evaluation of fisheries monitoring programmes, including boat ramp creel surveys, harvest estimation, and electronic data acquisition systems.
- **Data Systems & Information Management**: Database architecture, data governance and fisheries information systems, built on PostgreSQL and MS SQL Server.
- **Analytics & Decision Support**: Statistical analysis, modelling, visualisation and reporting, including GLM and CPUE standardisation, GIS and spatial analysis, and R Markdown/Quarto reporting.
- **Automation & Digital Solutions**: Workflow automation, AI-enabled processes and operational efficiency, including Git-based version control and Power BI/Power Automate workflows.

### Get in touch

I am open to consulting enquiries. The best way to reach me is by email at [jademaggs@gmail.com](mailto:jademaggs@gmail.com).

[Download capability statement](assets/jade_maggs_capability_statement.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

### Quick facts

| | |
|---|---|
| **Location** | Brisbane, Australia |
| **PhD** | Fisheries Science, Rhodes University, 2017 |
| **h-index** | 13 (Scopus) |
| **Papers** | 24 peer-reviewed |
| **Reports** | 81 technical |
| **Experience** | 18 years |

### Tools

`R` `SQL` `PostgreSQL` `MS SQL Server` `Azure` `Microsoft Fabric` `QGIS` `R Markdown` `Quarto` `Git` `GitLab` `Power BI` `Power Automate` `Linux` `Bash` `LaTeX`

### Links

- [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Jade_Maggs)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jade-maggs-phd-5a091729/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/jademaggs)
- [Scopus](https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=55250227800)

:::

::::
